use_cases: Displaying time-series data such as revenue, users, or conversions over a time period
Visualizing stock prices, market trends, or financial metrics in fintech applications
Tracking website traffic, page views, or engagement metrics for analytics dashboards
Monitoring application performance metrics like response times or error rates
Showing sales trends, inventory levels, or customer growth over defined periods
ai_summary: A Reaviz-based area chart component for visualizing time-series or sequential data with gradient-filled areas, interactive hover tooltips, and smooth animations. Built as a composite data visualization element that integrates axes, gridlines, and gradient styling. Commonly used in SaaS dashboards, fintech applications, and e-commerce analytics to display metrics like revenue trends, user growth, or traffic patterns.
